---
title: "NAIF elsewhere"
subtitle: "Brief mentions of the project outside this website"
description: "A small archive of brief NAIF mentions in newsletters, internal blogs, and other channels outside the project website."
aliases:
  - mentions.html
  - /mentions.html
other-links:
  - text: "About"
    href: ../about.html
  - text: "News"
    href: ../posts/
listing:
  id: mentions-listing
  contents: items.yml
  type: table
  sort: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 1000
  max-items: 1000
  fields: [when, title, format, mention, related]
  field-display-names:
    when: "When"
    title: "Outlet"
    format: "Format"
    mention: "Mention"
    related: "Related NAIF pages"
  field-links: [title]
toc: false
show-page-image: false
---

This page records short mentions of NAIF outside the project website. Full reposts with permission remain regular [News](../posts/) posts and link back to their original publication.

::: {#mentions-listing}
:::

<style>
#listing-mentions-listing .mentions-related-links {
  margin: 0;
  padding-left: 1.25rem;
}

#listing-mentions-listing .mentions-related-links li {
  margin: 0;
}
</style>

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
  const relatedCells = document.querySelectorAll(
    "#listing-mentions-listing .listing-related",
  );

  for (const cell of relatedCells) {
    const links = Array.from(cell.querySelectorAll("a"));

    if (links.length === 0) {
      continue;
    }

    const list = document.createElement("ul");
    list.className = "mentions-related-links";

    for (const link of links) {
      const item = document.createElement("li");
      item.append(link.cloneNode(true));
      list.append(item);
    }

    cell.replaceChildren(list);
  }
});
</script>
